name: JT Morgan Credit Resolution
description_short: Credit repair company offering dispute services, debt collection letter review, and credit analysis to help remove negative items and improve credit scores.
description_long:
JT Morgan Credit Resolution is a Tennessee-registered credit services business (Program #33) that specializes in credit repair and restoration services. The company operates through a structured consultation and analysis process designed to assess whether clients need credit repair (removal of negative items) or credit building (addition of positive accounts). Founded on the principle of personalized credit guidance, JT Morgan explicitly states they do not accept all clients, first determining if credit repair or building is the appropriate solution.

The company offers several core services including pre-litigation credit restoration, credit repair through dispute processes, free debt collection letter reviews, credit analysis consultations, and business & personal funding referrals. Their process involves scheduling a consultation, obtaining a tri-merge credit report (combining all three bureau reports), uploading identity verification documents, and then disputing questionable items on the client's credit report. They provide tiered service plans including Standard, Advanced, and Couples options, though specific pricing details are not fully visible on the website.

JT Morgan differentiates itself through its selective client intake process and emphasis on tri-merge reporting rather than relying on consumer-facing tools like Credit Karma. The company positions itself as offering guidance on both credit repair and credit building strategies, recognizing that not all clients need the same solutions. They operate with an attorney partnership program but clearly state they themselves are not attorneys or legal advisors.

A significant limitation is the lack of transparent pricing information on the website—no specific cost details are provided for their various service tiers. Additionally, the company's small profile and limited online reviews make it difficult to independently verify success rates or customer satisfaction. Like all credit repair services, their effectiveness depends on whether disputed items are actually inaccurate, and they cannot remove accurate negative information from credit reports.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Selective intake process ensures they only take clients they can actually help
Offers free debt collection letter reviews for prospective clients
Uses tri-merge credit reports combining all three bureaus for comprehensive analysis
Distinguishes between credit repair and credit building, providing appropriate guidance
Tennessee-registered credit services business with regulatory program number
Partnership with attorneys for pre-litigation credit restoration services
Provides credit analysis to assess mortgage, auto loan, and credit card approval likelihood
cons: No transparent pricing information displayed on website for any service tier
Limited online presence and minimal customer reviews available for verification
Not attorneys themselves, which may limit legal expertise in complex disputes
Requires extensive personal documentation (ID, SSN card, utility bill) early in process
No clear timeline or guarantee of results provided on the website
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items on credit reports seeking comprehensive dispute strategy
People who have received debt collection letters and need professional review
Clients wanting personalized credit analysis before applying for mortgages or major loans
Individuals who need guidance on whether credit repair or credit building is appropriate
diagnosis: JT Morgan Credit Resolution is best for consumers with negative credit items who want professional dispute assistance and personalized guidance on whether they need repair or building strategies. The main caveat is the complete lack of transparent pricing information—you must schedule a consultation to learn costs, and the company's limited public reputation makes it difficult to verify service quality before committing.
services: Initial credit consultations and needs analysis
Tri-merge credit report analysis combining all three bureaus
Credit repair through disputing negative items
Credit analysis for loan approval likelihood
Secure document upload via proprietary software
SMS, email, and phone support contact
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
